---
title: Sample paper
---

The tidyverse [@doi:10.21105/joss.01686] is a coherent grammar for data
manipulation in R. Single-cell integration approaches like Seurat
[@doi:10.1101/460147] handle the bioRxiv preprint side. Transformer
architectures [@arxiv:1706.03762] underlie current AI tooling, and
reference datasets [@pmid:23715323] anchor the biological claims.
